message:
feat: add Parquet file support to CLI

- Add ParquetTable wrapper in src/parquet_table.zig for reading Parquet files
- Add file type detection (by extension and magic bytes) in CLI
- Support reading uncompressed Parquet files with int32, int64, float32,
  float64, string, and bool column types
- Add parquet_table module to build.zig
- Add runLanceQL function to benchmarks for fair CLI-based comparison
